repository.ownership_evidence: Repository owner and HEAD commit author are Yanzhen Chen, the paper's first author in arXiv metadata and a listed equal-contribution author in the manuscript.
repository.discovery_evidence: Found by exact-title and GitHub repository searches; immutable arXiv v1 does not link this repository.
repository.timing_boundary: HEAD predates arXiv v1 by 15 days and is plausibly a pre-v1 implementation snapshot, but the manuscript does not identify a code commit and the archive is not proven to be the exact experiment tree.

inspection.static_compile_result: 51 of 52 Python files compile; agents/rag_agent/agentic_decision/eval.py has an f-string SyntaxError at line 537.
notable_release_findings: README advertises build_sequence.py, but the file is absent.
Default BuildConfig.run.DEMO_MODE is true with DEMO_N=5.
Decision evaluation defaults to CLIP_PAITENT=true and patient IDs 1 through 50 excluding 8.
No benchmark patient files, generated questions, experimental predictions, summaries, or aggregate-result records are released.
Question generation samples two predecessor events per visit and uses the recorded next event as the T3-N target.
T3-D labels whether recorded discharge occurs within six hours and intentionally samples close pre-discharge timestamps toward a configured 70 percent Yes ratio.
Evaluation skips provider/model exceptions and averages only scored questions without reporting invalid-run denominators.
Weighted option scoring uses substring containment and permits extra predicted options until the score is clipped at one.
